rationale: Göktürks succeeded the Xiongnu on the same steppe. Shared Turkic ethnic heritage and territory.
Uyghurs overthrew the Göktürks. Same Turkic ethnicity, same Mongolian steppe territory.
Khazars were a Turkic people who established themselves in the Pontic steppe. Same Turkic ethnicity, new western territory.
Mongols rose on the same Mongolian steppe after the Uyghur decline. Different Mongolic ethnicity, same homeland.
Golden Horde is the western branch of the Mongol Empire on the Pontic steppe.
Chagatai Khanate inherited Central Asia directly from the Mongol Empire. Same ethnicity and territory.
